title: [OLD] Plenty a' Trades
description: [OLD VERSION, NEW VERSION AVAILABLE] Adds plenty a' more trades for villagers.
body:
## This mod has a remake! You can download my new mod, which'll include the changes in this mod, and more, called [Plenty a' Tweaks!](https://modrinth.com/project/plenty-a-tweaks)

A small mod that adds some extra trades to villagers. You can buy and sell rare items with Wandering Traders, Toolsmiths, and Armorers sell more tools, Clerics sell potion ingredients, Farmers, Butchers, and Cartographers each have a new useful trade, and more coming soon!
